comment.body:
key takeaway: how could i tell you after that violent sunday gap down that market will rebound after the opening? did i know how the meeting will go between US vs Mexico? hell no.
it is bcs its all staged, well-timed to amplify moves.
policymakers know what they are gonna do. 
they play with the news, play with vol trades. 

events are just fake excuses for messing with the sentiment.
very few times it actually matters. thats when tail-events occur. 
but in the majority, it is all staged
